nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.grounding_span: use AI as a starting point for research

nodes.label: AI for template-based brief generation
nodes.grounding_span: use AI specifically to generate project briefs

nodes.label: AI as supporting tool for writers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm fine with giving AI supporting tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability and consistency
nodes.grounding_span: kept making them too short despite being told very specifically what word count to aim for

nodes.label: AI as threat to job security
nodes.label_negative: AI as opportunity for skilled writers
nodes.grounding_span: my copywriting work disappeared almost overnight

nodes.label: AI use in creative writing
nodes.grounding_span: I've found great ways to incorporate AI into that work

nodes.label: Professional competence and reputation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm a high-level writer at my company

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: I was getting paid per brief, so that really affected how much I was getting paid per hour

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I still want to be the star of the show when it comes to the actual written content

nodes.label: Career sustainability and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: it makes me work harder to keep up my skillset so I can compete

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as research aid
nodes.grounding_span: I like when I can ask a question about the topic I'm working on

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inconsistency
nodes.grounding_span: kept making them too short despite being told very specifically what word count to aim for

nodes.label: Concern about AI detection false positives
nodes.grounding_span: I always worry that something I've written completely on my own could still get flagged by an AI checker

nodes.label: Optimism about hybrid model opportunities
nodes.grounding_span: people like me...are going to have other opportunities to replace the work that's gone

nodes.label: Worry about future of entry-level writers
nodes.grounding_span: what will that mean for the future of human copywriting and content writing?

nodes.label: Strategic delegation with verification
nodes.grounding_span: I find it easier to verify the information from a source that meets certain criteria

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI to write my articles
